text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while walking around the academy...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Don't try to stop me. I've gotta do this
myself.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
As things are, I won't be able to stop you by
myself. And I told you to call me "Princess"!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you... Nothin', really. No big deal.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I guess you could say... I'm preparin' myself to do
what needs to be done.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Vodka has to take remedial test-prep, so we're
trying to make it more interesting!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Kawakamiii! Did you have to go and say it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I-it's not my fault I flunked it! The test covered
way too many chapters!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: It's not like I want to take some dumb makeup! But how was I supposed to study all that in one night?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Still, it's not like I can just ditch. So, I was walkin'
around, trying to think of a way to pump myself
up when—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I showed up and offered to help!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Once I heard the whole story, I knew exactly what
to do! We had to turn that extra class into her
mortal enemy!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Vodka—the tragic knight who leaves behind me,
her beloved princess, to defeat her mortal
enemy... Doesn't that sound exciting?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But now I'm right back to reality. Guess we'll have
to start over...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hey, how about you join us, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh my, what a wonderful idea! You'll need a role,
which means...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: If you're thinkin' what I'm thinkin'—

text_block_list.name: The Two
text_block_list.text:
The evil enemy commander blockin' the road to
the extra class! A rival knight competing for the
princess's heart!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Are you for real?! An enemy commander fits so
much better!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
But in the manga I know, there's always a love
triangle with a rival knight!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Looks like you're gonna have to be the
one to decide then, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Which one do you wanna be?
choice_data_list: A rival knight fighting for the princess's love.
The enemy commander blocking the hero's way.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Awww, c'mon! I can't believe this!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how could this happen! Whoever shall I
choose?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: She's already in character!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aww, well, if you say so... Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I won't let you take Kawakami from me! I swore
that I would protect her!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
How many years has it been since my pal Sam
went missing? I've been taking care of his older
sister ever since, trying to keep at least one thing
pure in this rotten city...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wait a second! Wait a second! Cuuut!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I was just gettin' to the best part! We were
gonna flashback to me meetin' Sam at the city
dump...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Who is this "Sam" person?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
You're supposed to be a knight, aren't you?! Why
does your story start like you're some hoodlum?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I just thought it would be cooler... Love triangles
are dumb, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
No, no! That won't do at all! A knight is basically
like a prince!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We're starting over under my creative direction! I
won't take no for an answer!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
W-would you look at the time! I better get to that
class...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, you don't! Now, the first thing you should
know about knights is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess continues on passionately,
eventually causing Vodka to run away screaming
toward the classrooms just to get away.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hah! Just what I was hopin' for!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Outta the way, Trainer! I won't let you stop me!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Whaaat?! You're supposed to get in my way a
little!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Well, that ended quickly...
choice_data_list: I'll treat you to something if you finish early.
I'll treat you to something if you finish early.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
For real?! Even the "Oops! Patties for Buns
Burger" from the school store?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Hell yeah! I'll hold you to that!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Just you wait, Trainer. I'll be back in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh, and thanks your your help, Kawakami!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: How lovely. You two really do work well together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It helps that Vodka is so straightforward... At any
rate, I should hurry up and get that burger ready
for her.
